data.title: Cryptocurrency Aave Decreases More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Aave's (CRYPTO: AAVE) price has fallen 3.17% to $151.92. This is opposite to its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 10.0% gain, moving from $138.29 to its current price.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Filecoin Decreases More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Filecoin's (CRYPTO: FIL) price has fallen 3.5% to $3.61. This is opposite to its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 3.0% gain, moving from $3.5 to its current price.

data.title: Musk, Cuban, Or Saylor: Who's The Biggest Crypto Influencer? Benzinga Readers Have An Overwhelming Favorite
data.description:
Billionaire and cryptocurrency founders are among the key influencers who with a single tweet or public comment can significantly move the price of several cryptocurrencies.



A recent Benzinga poll highlights which figures have the most influence when it comes to moving cryptocurrency prices.

data.title: Cardano Decreases More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Cardano's (CRYPTO: ADA) price has decreased 3.35% over the past 24 hours to $0.34. This is contrary to the coins performance over the past week where it has experienced an up-trend of 1.0%, moving from $0.34 to its current price.
